settings.title: System Settings
settings.description: Manage database, LLM Provider, and novel generation workflow configurations

provider.title: LLM Provider Management
provider.mustExist: Default Provider must exist in the configured list

genParams.title: Generation Parameters (Optional)
genParams.hint: Configure default generation parameters for this provider. When enabled, these values will be used as defaults unless overridden per request.
genParams.systemPromptPlaceholder: Enter default system prompt for this provider...

workflow.title: Novel Generation Workflow
workflow.formatReviewHint: Used to fix malformed AI responses; must support JSON Schema

steps.extract_idea: Extract core story elements from user idea
steps.core_seed: Generate story core seed from elements

workflow.providerDisabled: Selected Provider is disabled, enable it manually after saving

validation.providerNotExist: Referenced Provider does not exist, cannot save
validation.workflowProviderNotExist: Workflow step references a non-existent Provider, cannot save

bookshelf.title: My Bookshelf
bookshelf.emptyGuide: Your bookshelf is empty. Click "New Novel" to start your creative journey!
bookshelf.noSelection: Select a novel from the left to view details, or create a new one
bookshelf.deleteConfirm: Confirm to delete "{title}"? This can be restored.
bookshelf.hardDeleteConfirm: Permanently delete "{title}"? This action CANNOT be undone.

novel.title: Title
novel.subtitle: Subtitle
novel.dangerEditMessage: This novel already has chapters/volumes. Editing the summary, core seed, worldview, writing style, narrative POV, or era background may cause irreversible impact on subsequent generation. Are you sure you want to continue?

create.title: Create Novel
create.ideaPlaceholder: Describe the story you want to write, e.g.: A loser teenager awakens a time-reversal ability in a post-apocalyptic world...
create.reviewDescription: You can modify the results below, then save to create the novel

genParams.title: Generation Parameters (Optional), if you don't understand, please do not enable or modify
genParams.hint: Override LLM generation parameters for this creation session. If not set, provider defaults will be used.
genParams.systemPromptPlaceholder: Enter a system prompt to guide the AI generation style...
